title: Totem Mahiro Oyama!
description:
Replaces Totem with the character Mahiro Oyama.
With custom sound.
body:
_Hello, does the connection work even in the parking lot? Great then, I want to inform you that updating this resource pack still depends on my laziness, maybe I'm a little late with the update, but what's there to update? The resource pack works well anyway, right?_
- If you want to contact me, here is my discord: **niotrain**

## Replaces Totem with the character Mahiro Oyama. 
With custom sound.

For the resource pack to work correctly, you need to install the following mods:
1. **Polytone** _(**Fabric**)_
2. **Cit Resewn** _(**Fabric**, alternative if **Polytone** is not on your old version)_
1. **Optifine** _(**Forge**, Who even plays with forge on new versions?)_

## Full description:
This resource pack replaces the texture of the totem with the character Mahiro Oyama, the main character of the anime and manga ONIMAI: I’m Now Your Sister. If anyone is wondering what kind of character this is, I advise you to go to the shikimori website: <details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://shikimori.one/animes/51678-oniichan-wa-oshimai

</details>

## Video demonstration:
(The video was removed due to some personal reasons. Not subject to restoration)
